title: Escape from Impel Down: Rising Conflict
description: In the Impel Down storyline, this section centers on Magellan, Unknown person #2, Whitebeard, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #1 as the scene develops across pages 6–9.
scene: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Magellan, Unknown person #2, Whitebeard, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #12, focusing on the immediate stakes of escape from impel down: rising conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: That's the same thing from before....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Use the other cannons and shoot him!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Hurry!! Hurry!! He's right behind us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Same Floor, Prisoners Waiting for the Ship

dialogue.speaker: Magellan
dialogue.text: It's Magellan!! There's nowhere left to run!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Straw- Chan, the ship's not here yet!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: First Floor, Sea Surface, Front Entrance
